title: Euclidean distance degree of projective varieties
author_string: Laurentiu G. Maxim, Jose Israel Rodriguez, Botong Wang
abstract: We give a positive answer to a conjecture of Aluffi-Harris on the computation of the Euclidean distance degree of a possibly singular projective variety in terms of the local Euler obstruction function.
comment: 10 pages. Key words: Euclidean distance degree, Euler characteristic, local Euler obstruction function
